messages.content: What is the weather in Boston, MA? Use the provided tool.

messages.reasoning_content: The user wants to know the weather in Boston, MA and asked to use the provided tool. I need to call the get_weather function with location "Boston, MA".

function.name: get_weather
function.description: Look up the current weather for a city.

location.description: City and optional region, e.g. 'Boston, MA'.
